title: mimulus bifidus
intro: Mimulus bifidus, also known as yellow monkey flower or yutaka, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It is native to the western coast of North America and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and potentially alleviating symptoms of depression. Mimulus bifidus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
